# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.
# Category: datastore_security

redisReplicationConfiguration:
    # Specify the master server's configuration (unsecure) on port [PORT] with 'masterauth'. 
    MasterServerConfig_UnsecuredPort:[PORTSPECIFICATIONHERE],  
    
    MinSlavesToReadPolicy : "0" ,        	# set min-slaves-to-write to zero which means if any slave server is down then the read operation will succeed. 
                                        	 # This reduces traffic between master and slaves, enhancing availability of reads in case one or more servers become unavailable   .   
          									      		    	   	     			     	 	        - MasterServerConfig_UnsecuredPort: [PORT]               ]        }        `
